seoTitle: Carmila vs Carnarvon Park — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Carmila and Carnarvon Park. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Carmila vs Carnarvon Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Carmila and Carnarvon Park.
heading: Carmila vs Carnarvon Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Carmila, Queensland and Carnarvon Park, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Carnarvon Park has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Carmila (31/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Carmila or Carnarvon Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Carmila has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Carnarvon Park scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Carmila scores 38/100 for bushfire risk. Carnarvon Park scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Carmila or Carnarvon Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Carnarvon Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.18% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
